task.title: Adding Fields on the Custom Report

step.cmd: Create a custom report. Follow the steps in . You cannot add custom fields to a report when you login as a CDS Manager.
Select the field you want to add on the report from the Fields pane.

info.p: The fields get added on the report.

step.cmd: Go to File and select Save As.
step.info: The Save As dialog box is displayed.

step.cmd: Enter the name of the report and click Save.
step.info: The report gets saved in the User Defined section.
